_meta.description: Schema for a review event record in the Oil Painting Research Assistant. One record per review action taken on a source or chunk. Review records form the audit trail for metadata changes and approval state transitions.
_meta.storage_note: Review records are stored in the metadata store. They are not stored in ChromaDB.

review_id.description: Unique review record ID. Assigned sequentially per entity.

entity_type.description: Whether this review record applies to a source or a chunk.

entity_id.description: The source_id or chunk_id of the entity being reviewed.

review_stage.description: The stage of the review workflow this record documents.

reviewer.description: Username or identifier of the reviewer performing this action.

review_date.description: Timestamp when this review action was performed.

action.description: The action taken during this review.

status_before.description: The review_status or approval_state of the entity before this review action.

status_after.description: The review_status or approval_state of the entity after this review action.

summary_of_findings.description: Summary of what the reviewer found: what was correct, what was changed, what concerns remain.

field_changes.description: List of field values changed during this review. Each entry records the field name, old value, and new value.

warnings.description: Any quality flags, concerns, or issues noted during this review that do not block approval but should be tracked.

next_action.description: Recommended next action for this entity after this review. Null if no follow-up required.

notes.description: Optional additional context about this review event.
